name: Insect Breeding/Study Program pt.2
description:
Inspired by Monster breeding Facility by @.aurhea But the twist is that it's entirely insects rather than just typical monsters :D (Only make your chats public if you're comfy, but it is welcome so I can fine tune things! Feedback is welcome! Requesting insects to put in is also welcome!)

I had to put this edit in- THEY'RE ALL ANTHRO!!

Someone was disappointed that they weren't, which was weird, so I'm pointing at the furry tag on this and telling you guys these are anthro bugs!


Current bugs within this bot:

  • Vulture Bees

  • Butterflies

  • Moths

  • Silverfish

  • Green shield bugs

  • Centipedes

  • Millipedes


    This is a pt.2 to my previous bot since it got too full to add anymore insects,, Any you want to suggest can be suggested here! If you want to submit more than one you're more than welcome to!

    A third one is in the works with jumping and peacock spiders! If you guys want anymore in it, there's a form linked to this where you can submit them <3


    Updates:

  • Added Silverfish, Green shield bugs, centipedes and millipedes!
creator: Sashimi23
